====================================================
Marathon UI + FPS Optimizer (Ultimate Trainer) v1.0
====================================================

Password: marathon2026

FILES INCLUDED:
- MarathonOptimizer.exe (main tool)
- profiles/ (pre-configured settings)
- trainer_module.dll (optional trainer features)
- readme.txt (this file)

WHAT THIS TOOL DOES:
- Fixes microscopic UI (scale, clutter removal)
- Boosts FPS, especially in Outpost (engine tweaks, shader cache)
- Converts sensitivity from Destiny 2/Valorant/CS2
- Includes experimental trainer module (God Mode, Infinite Ammo, etc.)

HOW TO USE:
1. Extract all files to any folder.
2. Run MarathonOptimizer.exe AS ADMINISTRATOR.
3. Apply UI Fix and FPS Boost.
4. (Optional) Enable trainer features from the Trainer tab.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Windows 10/11
- Marathon installed (Steam/Epic)

NOTE: Antivirus may false-positive – it's safe. Add to exclusions.

For updates and support:
https://github.com/yigitturukk/marathon-ui-fps-optimizer-trainer

Enjoy a smooth Marathon experience!
